category_sources: source_facts.description says PDF rendering library; official homepage https://poppler.freedesktop.org/ describes Poppler as a PDF rendering library and lists PDF APIs/tools.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and freedesktop wiki use Poppler: https://poppler.freedesktop.org/ and https://www.freedesktop.org/wiki/Software/poppler/.
docs_sources: Official homepage lists generated API documentation for cpp, glib, qt5, and qt6: https://poppler.freedesktop.org/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Poppler homepage says Poppler is developed with git and links/browses the repository on GitLab: https://poppler.freedesktop.org/ and https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/poppler/poppler.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a PDF rendering library; source_facts.executables list pdf utilities; official homepage lists Poppler APIs and git repository.
